---
title: "fetch_data: APGAR (NESTED)"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

working_dir <- find_repo_root()
source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/nested_ingestion.R"))

registry <- load_registry()
site <- "GNV"

raw <- read_standardized_dataset("apgar", "raw", site, registry)

df <- raw$data %>%
  mutate(part_id_infant = paste0("infant-", part_id_infant_tmp),
         apgar5min_score_low = if_else(apgar_total_5min <= 3, 1, 0))

out_dir <- get_processed_dir(site)
save(df, file = file.path(out_dir, "apgar_nested.rda"))
```
